metadata.title: Support Remix — Donate
metadata.description: Remix is free and open source. Support the team behind the world's most-used Web3 development environment.

hero.title: Keep Remix Free for Everyone
hero.description: Remix is a public good — free, open source, and maintained by a small team. Your support helps us keep shipping features, maintaining infrastructure, and educating the next wave of Web3 developers.

options.title: Gitcoin Grants
options.description: Support Remix through Gitcoin's quadratic funding rounds. Every contribution gets matched.

options.title: Direct ETH / Crypto
options.description: Send ETH or ERC-20 tokens directly to the Remix team's multisig wallet.

options.title: GitHub Sponsors
options.description: Recurring or one-time sponsorship through GitHub. Perfect for individuals and companies.

usage.title: How We Use Funds
usage.description: Donations go directly into making Remix better.

items.title: Core Development
items.description: Fund full-time engineers maintaining Remix IDE, the compiler, and integrations.

items.title: Open Source Infrastructure
items.description: Keep remix.ethereum.org free, fast, and always available.

items.title: Education & Tutorials
items.description: Produce LearnEth content, video guides, and documentation.

items.title: Community Events
items.description: Support hackathons, workshops, and developer meetups worldwide.
